title: Skitarii
lore: The Skitarii are the cybernetic warrior-priests of the Adeptus Mechanicus — soldiers who have been extensively augmented with mechanical replacements, neurally bonded to their weapons, and surgically altered to endure environments lethal to unmodified humans.

They form the core military force of every Forge World, deployed in disciplined maniples of Rangers, Vanguard, and heavier support elements. Where a Forge World's interests are threatened, the Skitarii march — tireless, emotionless, and utterly precise.

Skitarii do not serve willingly in the human sense. Their free will is suppressed by the Doctrina Imperatives — data-commands beamed from Tech-Priest Overseers that override higher cognition and direct the warriors with machine precision. Off the battlefield, many Skitarii barely function independently.
